CrisisResources.disclaimer: MindReset is a wellbeing tool — not therapy, not a medical device, and not a substitute for professional care. If you are in immediate danger, please use one of the lines above or call 999.

DisclaimerModal.title: Important — before you continue
DisclaimerModal.primary: MindReset is a wellbeing tool — not therapy, not a medical device, not a crisis service.
DisclaimerModal.secondary: The AI here cannot diagnose, treat, or replace a clinician. If you are in crisis, in danger, or experiencing severe psychological symptoms — please reach out to professional support.
DisclaimerModal.crisisLine: UK: Samaritans 116 123 (24/7). NHS 111 option 2. Your GP. In an emergency: 999 or A&E.

Home.welcomeBody: A way back to yourself, one conversation at a time.

yourMiniMind.remainingFree: {count, plural, one {# message remaining} other {# messages remaining}}
yourMiniMind.remainingPaid: {count, plural, one {# message remaining this cycle} other {# messages remaining this cycle}}

comingSoon.label: More coming soon
comingSoon.note: Themed modules and an 8-block journey are on their way.

heroBody: You feel it, don't you? That quiet sense that something inside is misaligned.
You are functioning. You are capable. But underneath — there is confusion, exhaustion, or emptiness you cannot quite explain.
This is where you stop. And begin again.
Landing.whatLead: MindReset is a structured digital reflection platform designed to help you regain emotional clarity, inner stability, and a sense of self-direction.
whatHelpsItems: Reconnect with who you are beneath roles and expectations
Landing.whoLead: MindReset is designed for adults navigating internal transitions:
whoScenarios: Feeling lost or disconnected despite doing everything right
Emotional burnout after years of responsibility or caregiving
Identity confusion after divorce, relocation, ageing, or major life shifts
Chronic self-neglect, people-pleasing, putting others first
Saying: I have tried therapy, books, and self-work — but something still feels missing
Landing.whoClose: It is for those who are emotionally stable, but internally disoriented.
Landing.safetyLead: MindReset is built with emotional safety at its core.
safetyItems: No diagnoses. No labels. No pressure.
No deep trauma work unless you choose it.
You can pause, slow down, or stop at any moment.
If your responses suggest distress or instability, the system pauses gently and points you to professional support.

paths.name: MiniMind
paths.body: A warm chat companion you can return to anytime. Daily check-ins, short grounding practices, a place to land when something is heavy. It learns your patterns gently, and suggests deeper work when it would help.

paths.name: States & Themes
paths.body: Short structured journeys for specific moments. States for the present: anxiety, disconnection, inner emptiness, numbness. Themes for the patterns underneath: money and self-worth, family, the body, shame, self-realisation.

paths.name: The Journey
paths.body: A slow, sequential journey from stabilisation to a new sense of who you are. Months of work, paced by what your system can hold. Built to release beliefs that were never yours, restore your boundaries, and remember yourself.

Landing.differentTitle:
Most platforms give advice.
MindReset gives structure.
differentItems: Just a clear, contained path — at your pace
Landing.closingBody: You do not need to be in pieces to start. You do not need to know what you want. The check-in tells us — gently — whether this is right for you in this moment.

MiniMind.opener: Hello. Good to have you here. How are you doing today?
MiniMind.streamErrorSuffix: — *(I lost my thread for a moment. Please send again when you're ready.)*
MiniMind.conversationInProgress: You have a conversation in progress.

errors.permissionDenied: Microphone access denied. You can enable it in your browser settings.
errors.rateLimited: Please pause a moment, then try again.
errors.unavailable: Voice input is unavailable right now.

atCap.subscriberTitle: You've used all your messages for this billing period.
atCap.subscriberBody: Your allowance resets on {date}. You can add 200 more messages now.
atCap.freeBody: Choose a plan to keep going.

Screening.tagline: A trauma-informed self-help companion — not therapy, not a crisis service.
Screening.introBody: This short questionnaire helps us understand whether MindReset is the right fit for you right now. It takes about five minutes. Some questions are direct — answer honestly. If anything feels too much, you can close this tab at any moment.
Screening.ageGate: I confirm I am 18 or older.
Screening.notMedical: I understand this is not medical or psychiatric treatment.
Screening.submitErrorBody: Your answers came through but we had trouble saving them — please refresh and try again.
Screening.selectAll: Tick anything that applies to you right now.
Screening.pickOne: Choose the one that best describes you.
Screening.secFunctionality: How you function day to day
Screening.exclusionTitle: Is any of this true for you in this period of your life?
Screening.functionalityTitle: How much does each of these match your current life?
Screening.emotionalTitle: How present is each of these for you right now?
Screening.traumaTitle: Which of these is closest to how things feel about your past?
Screening.consentTitle: Before you proceed, please confirm you understand:
exclusion: Current thoughts of suicide, with intent or a plan
A suicide attempt in the past 12 months
A diagnosis of schizophrenia, schizoaffective disorder, or psychosis
A diagnosis of bipolar disorder with manic episodes
Severe depression that stops you doing daily tasks
Untreated severe PTSD or complex PTSD
Living in a home that is currently unsafe (domestic violence)
A current eating disorder with medical instability
functionality: I can do daily things — wash, eat, work, basic tasks
I can focus on a conversation for at least 10 minutes
I feel safe in my home environment
I can regulate myself, at least partially, when upset
I can feel basic emotions, rather than complete numbness
I can describe my feelings in simple words
emotional: I get triggered suddenly and lose control
trauma: I have mild emotional wounds but function normally
I have unresolved past issues but can stay stable
My past trauma overwhelms me regularly
I cannot stay emotionally safe when remembering the past
cognitive: I can follow instructions step by step
I can imagine simple things, or sense them through the body
I understand that MindReset requires active participation from me
consent: MindReset is not medical or psychiatric treatment
MindReset cannot support a crisis, suicidal state, or psychosis
I will be honest about my symptoms in each session
I will stop the process if I feel unsafe
The AI may stop the process for safety reasons, and I accept that
I take responsibility for my decisions and life changes
I understand MindReset only works if I actively participate
Screening.redTitle: MindReset is not the right fit for you right now
Screening.redBody: What you described needs more than an AI companion can safely offer. That is not a failure on your part — it just means a real human, with proper training, is the right next step. Please reach out today, not tomorrow.

redResources.name: NHS 111
redResources.detail: Press option 2 for the mental health line

redResources.name: Your GP
redResources.detail: Ask for an urgent same-day appointment

redResources.name: A&E or 999
redResources.detail: If you feel unsafe right now

Screening.redFooter: We are not the right service for this moment, but the people above are. You deserve to be heard by someone who can really help.
Screening.yellowBody: Your answers tell us your nervous system is carrying a lot right now. The deeper modules of MindReset will not serve you well yet — they could make things harder, not easier. The right starting point is stabilisation work, focused only on bringing your system back into balance before going further.
yellowNext: Begin with MiniMind — the AI companion with daily check-ins and short grounding practices
No deep modules, no parts work, no past-focused exercises until your daily functioning is steadier
If you feel you need additional support, we encourage you to seek out a specialist working in the trauma-informed approach.
Screening.greenBody: Your answers suggest MindReset is a good fit for you right now. Below is what to expect, and the next step.
greenNext: You will create an account with your email
Before any module, you will see a short introduction explaining what to expect
Each session, the AI starts by checking in with how you are — there is never pressure to go further than feels right
You can pause, slow down, or stop at any moment

SignUp.agreeToTerms: I agree to the <link>Terms of Service</link>

preamble.operatorBody: Plataforma de autoayuda MindReset AI, operada por MindReset AI Ltd, empresa registrada en Inglaterra y Gales, con sede en Londres, Reino Unido.
preamble.note: [NOTA: El número de registro de la empresa y la dirección registrada se añadirán posteriormente. La metodología y la estructura del producto seguirán siendo las mismas.]
preamble.agreement: Al utilizar la plataforma de autoayuda MindReset AI (el «Servicio»), disponible en mindreset.ai, usted acepta estos Términos. Léalos atentamente. Si no está de acuerdo, por favor no utilice el Servicio.

section1.title: 1. Qué es este Servicio — y qué no es
section1.whatItIs: Qué es el Servicio. La plataforma de autoayuda MindReset AI («Servicio») es una plataforma de autoayuda asistida por IA orientada al bienestar psicológico general. Proporciona reflexión conversacional, ejercicios estructurados de autoexploración, prácticas de grounding, materiales educativos y seguimiento del progreso. Se basa en enfoques reconocidos, incluidos la regulación somática, el trabajo consciente con las distintas partes del yo, los principios trauma-informed de avance gradual, el replanteamiento narrativo y la formación integradora de la identidad. Está posicionada como una herramienta de bienestar para contextos no clínicos.
section1.notTherapyItem: No es terapia, asesoramiento psicológico ni tratamiento psiquiátrico
section1.notSubstituteItem: No sustituye a un clínico cualificado, médico o profesional autorizado de salud mental
section1.notCrisisItem: No es un servicio de crisis, servicio de emergencia ni línea de ayuda 24 horas
section1.notDiagnosticItem: No es una herramienta diagnóstica — el Servicio no diagnostica, trata, cura ni previene ninguna condición médica o psicológica
section1.closing: Si necesita atención clínica o está atravesando una situación que excede lo que la autoayuda puede apoyar, consulte a un profesional cualificado o contacte con los servicios de emergencia. Dentro del Servicio proporcionamos orientación hacia dichos servicios.

section2.title: 2. Comprobación de preparación (Section 0) — solo con fines informativos
section2.intro: Antes de acceder a los materiales más profundos del Servicio, se le invita a completar una breve Comprobación de preparación. La Comprobación de preparación se proporciona únicamente con fines informativos. No constituye una evaluación médica o psicológica, un diagnóstico ni un filtro clínico.
section2.classificationLabel: La Comprobación de preparación clasifica sus respuestas en una de las siguientes tres categorías informativas:
section2.greenItem: Green — Sus respuestas sugieren que el Servicio puede ser adecuado para usted en este momento.
section2.yellowItem: Yellow — Sus respuestas sugieren que podría beneficiarse de una introducción cuidadosa y gradual. Algunos materiales podrían no ser apropiados en este momento.
section2.redItem: Red — Sus respuestas sugieren que el Servicio puede no ser apropiado para usted en este momento y que el apoyo profesional sería más adecuado.
section2.importantLabel: Importante. La Comprobación de preparación proporciona información; no limita el acceso al Servicio. Usted puede decidir continuar independientemente del resultado. Si decide continuar a pesar de un resultado Red o Yellow, o repetir la Comprobación de preparación con respuestas diferentes, lo hace bajo su propia responsabilidad y confirma mediante el uso continuado que:
section2.understoodItem: Ha leído y comprendido el resultado de la Comprobación de preparación y las limitaciones del Servicio descritas en estos Términos;
section2.notForCrisisItem: Comprende que el Servicio no es apropiado para crisis activas, síntomas psiquiátricos graves, suicidabilidad activa, psicosis reciente, disociación que requiera atención clínica u otras condiciones que excedan el apoyo de autoayuda;
section2.acceptResponsibilityItem: Acepta plena responsabilidad por su decisión de utilizar el Servicio;
section2.releaseLiabilityItem: Libera al operador del Servicio (MindReset AI Ltd) de responsabilidad por cualquier daño derivado del uso del Servicio cuando la Comprobación de preparación haya indicado que podría no ser apropiado para usted.

section3.title: 3. Aceptación y edad
section3.intro: Al crear una cuenta o utilizar cualquier parte del Servicio, usted confirma que:
section3.acceptTermsItem: Acepta íntegramente estos Términos de Servicio
section3.jurisdictionItem: Accede al Servicio desde una jurisdicción donde ello es legal
section3.readDisclaimerItem: Ha leído el Medical & Crisis Disclaimer
section3.under18: Si es menor de 18 años, no está autorizado a utilizar el Servicio.

section4.title: 4. No Emergency or Professional Treatment
section4.intro: The Service is not designed for emergencies or active mental health crises.
section4.experiencingLabel: If you are experiencing any of the following, stop using the Service immediately and contact appropriate professional support:
section4.suicidalItem: Suicidal thoughts or intent to harm yourself
section4.acuteSymptomsItem: Acute psychiatric symptoms (psychosis, severe dissociation, mania)
section4.dangerItem: Any immediate physical danger to yourself or others
section4.gpItem: Your GP — for non-urgent mental health support
section4.aeItem: A&E or 999 — for any medical or psychiatric emergency
section4.liability: The operator of the Service and the Service itself are not liable for any decision or action you take based on AI suggestions or content provided through the Service.

section5.title: 5. Accounts and Security
section5.registerItem: You may register using your email address and a password. You may use a pseudonym.
section5.responsibilityItem: You are responsible for safeguarding your login credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.
section5.legalContentItem: You agree not to share illegal, threatening, defamatory, or abusive content within the Service.
section5.safetyItem: You agree not to attempt to circumvent or interfere with the Service's safety protocols, content filters, or technical safeguards.
section5.harmItem: You agree not to use the Service to harm others, infringe rights, or violate any applicable law.

section6.title: 6. AI and Automated Processing
section6.intro: The Service uses artificial intelligence (large language models provided by a third-party AI infrastructure partner) to generate conversational responses, suggest practices, and personalise educational content.
section6.inaccurateItem: AI responses are generated automatically and may be inaccurate, incomplete, or unsuitable for your circumstances
section6.notKnowItem: AI does not "know" or "understand" you in the way a human practitioner does
section6.notJudgmentItem: AI cannot replace the clinical judgment of a qualified professional
section6.informationalItem: AI-generated content should be treated as informational, not as personal advice
section6.consultItem: You should not rely on AI suggestions for decisions with significant life consequences without consulting a qualified professional
section6.profile: The AI processes your conversations to generate a private wellbeing profile (e.g., "elevated anxiety patterns") to better tailor practices. This profile is not a diagnosis and is not shared with third parties for marketing or research purposes. You may request to view, correct, or delete this profile at any time.
section6.humanReview: A human review process is available if you believe an automated response is materially incorrect or harmful. Contact <mail>support@mindreset.ai</mail>.
section6.voiceInput: You may use voice input as an alternative to typing on the MiniMind chat surface. Voice messages are securely transcribed and deleted after processing — we do not store the audio recording, and our speech-to-text provider is configured for zero data retention. Only the resulting text is saved to your conversation history (encrypted at rest). Voice input is optional — you may use the Service entirely by typing.

section7.title: 7. Intellectual Property
section7.ip: All texts, audio, code, design, methodology, brand identity, and other materials within the Service are © Julia Loya, except where third-party content is clearly marked.
section7.license: You receive a personal, non-transferable, non-exclusive, non-commercial licence to access and use the content of the Service for your own personal wellbeing during your subscription or purchase term.
section7.noRedistributeItem: Redistribute, resell, publish, or share the Service's content
section7.noScrapeItem: Extract, scrape, or otherwise harvest AI responses for the purpose of training another AI system
section7.noReverseItem: Reverse-engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract the source code of the Service
section7.noCommercialItem: Use the Service or its content for commercial gain

section8.title: 8. Paid Products
section8.intro: The Service offers three product types. Current pricing is always displayed at checkout before any payment is taken. We may change pricing, offer promotional discounts, run sales, or adjust pricing for any product at any time; such changes do not affect any product you have already purchased.

minimind.title: MiniMind
minimind.freeTaster: Free taster. Every new account receives 50 messages with MiniMind at no cost. The taster does not require a card, has no time limit, and is limited to one per email address.

subs.title: MiniMind subscriptions
subs.intro: Two tiers, each billed monthly or annually:
subs.essentialItem: MiniMind Essential — £14.99/month or £129/year. 200 messages per billing cycle.
subs.extendedItem: MiniMind Extended — £24.99/month or £209/year. 800 to 1,200 messages per billing cycle.
subs.billingItem: Charged to your chosen payment method until you cancel
subs.resetItem: Message allowance resets at the start of each billing cycle and does not roll over
subs.refundWindowItem: 7-day refund window: you may request a full refund within 7 days of your initial subscription purchase, having used fewer than 30 messages, by emailing support@mindreset.ai with "REFUND" in the subject. After 7 days or 30 messages used, the standard cancellation policy applies.
subs.cancellationItem: Cancellation: you may cancel at any time via your account billing settings. When you cancel:
subs.cancelNoFurtherItem: No further payments will be taken
subs.cancelRetainItem: You retain access until the end of your current billing cycle
subs.cancelAutoEndItem: Access ends automatically at the end of the current cycle
subs.noPartialItem: No partial-cycle refunds are issued for cancellations after the 7-day window

topup.title: Message top-up
topup.priceItem: £4.99 one-off charge — adds 200 messages to your current billing cycle
topup.expiryItem: Top-up messages expire when your billing cycle resets
topup.availableItem: Available to both Essential and Extended subscribers; stackable
topup.nonRefundableItem: Non-refundable — top-ups are delivered for immediate use as digital content

modules.title: States & Themes — individual module purchases
modules.subscriberDiscountItem: Active MiniMind subscribers (Essential or Extended) pay £29 per module — discount applied automatically at checkout when logged in with an active subscription
modules.immediateAccessItem: Access begins immediately upon successful payment
modules.waiverItem: At checkout, you confirm a waiver of the 14-day cancellation right under the Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, in exchange for immediate access. If you do not open the module within 14 days of purchase, you may request a full refund by emailing <mail>support@mindreset.ai</mail> with "REFUND" in the subject
modules.openedNonRefundableItem: Once a module has been opened, the purchase is non-refundable

journey.title: The Journey
journey.note: [NOTE: Product name finalised as "The Journey". Methodology described as the eight-stage Reset 8 Blocks framework — internal terminology only.]

onetime.title: Option A — Full programme, one-time payment:
onetime.accessItem: Access to all eight blocks begins immediately upon successful payment
onetime.nonRefundableItem: Non-refundable from the moment of purchase. This is digital content delivered for immediate use
onetime.regulationsItem: Under the Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, the 14-day cancellation right does not apply where the consumer has explicitly waived it in exchange for immediate access
onetime.confirmWaiverItem: You will be asked to confirm this waiver at checkout before payment is taken
onetime.noRefundsItem: No refunds are issued under any circumstances after purchase, except where required by the Consumer Rights Act 2015 for faulty content (see Refund Policy below)

instalment.title: Option B — Weekly instalment plan:
instalment.scheduleItem: 12 weekly payments of £55 — each payment unlocks the next block of content
instalment.stopAnytimeItem: You may stop future payments at any time
instalment.nonRefundableItem: Any weekly payments already made are non-refundable; previously unlocked content remains accessible after stopping payments
instalment.firstBlockItem: Once the first block has been accessed, the right to a cooling-off period no longer applies
instalment.confirmWaiverItem: You will be asked to confirm the immediate-access waiver at checkout

payment.title: Payment processing
payment.processor: All payments are processed by a regulated third-party payment processor, which acts as an independent data controller for payment card information under its own terms. We do not store full card numbers or CVV codes.
payment.taxes: All prices include VAT where applicable. We may add or remove sales taxes based on your billing location as required by law.

section9.title: 9. Cancellation
section9.subscriptionsItem: Subscriptions: cancel anytime in your account billing settings; no further charges will be made
section9.oneOffItem: One-off products: email support@mindreset.ai with "REFUND" in the subject line, your order ID, account email, and reason for refund

section10.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
section10.asIs: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, to the fullest extent permitted by law.
section10.fullestExtentLabel: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law:
section10.aggregateItem: Our total aggregate liability to you for any claim arising from your use of the Service is limited to the greater of (a) the amount you paid us in the six (6) months preceding the claim, or (b) £100.
section10.indirectItem: We are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages of any kind.
section10.decisionsItem: We are not liable for any decisions you make, actions you take, or harm you experience as a result of using the Service, except where such liability cannot be excluded by law.
section10.nothingItem: Nothing in these Terms excludes our liability for death or personal injury caused by our negligence, for fraud, or for any other liability that cannot lawfully be excluded.
section10.statutoryRights: Nothing in these Terms affects your statutory rights as a consumer under the Consumer Rights Act 2015 or the Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers Act 2024.

section11.title: 11. Data Protection
section11.specialCategory: We process personal and special-category data as described in our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>. Special-category data (including data about your mental health and wellbeing) is processed only with your explicit consent, which you grant by accepting these Terms and using the Service for its intended purpose.
section11.lawfulBasis: The lawful basis for processing this data is explicit consent under Article 9(2)(a) UK GDPR and the equivalent provision of EU GDPR. You may withdraw this consent at any time by deleting your account, at which point your conversational data will be deleted in accordance with our retention schedule.

section12.title: 12. Compliance with Applicable Law
section12.intro: The Service operates in compliance with applicable UK and EU law as it stands at the time of last update of these Terms, including but not limited to:
section12.gdprItem: UK GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018
section12.duaItem: Data (Use and Access) Act 2025 (in force from 5 February 2026)
section12.aiActItem: EU AI Act (where applicable; the Service is positioned as a limited-risk AI system for general wellbeing support, not a high-risk AI system)
section12.onlineSafetyItem: Online Safety Act 2023 (where applicable; we maintain content moderation and safety protocols including, without limitation, detection and response to content involving self-harm and other priority harms)
section12.mdrItem: Medical Devices Regulations 2002 — the Service is not a medical device and does not make medical claims
section12.minors: We do not target users under 18 and do not knowingly process the personal data of minors.

section13.title: 13. Governing Law and Disputes
section13.governing: These Terms are governed by the laws of England & Wales. Any dispute arising under these Terms shall be submitted to the courts of England & Wales, unless mandatory consumer law in your country of residence (within the UK or EU) allows you to bring a claim in your local courts.
section13.odr: For EU users, you may also have the right to use the European Commission's Online Dispute Resolution platform: <odr>https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr</odr>

section14.title: 14. Changes to These Terms
section14.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. If we make material changes, we will notify you by email and/or by displaying notice within the Service at least 30 days before the changes take effect. Continued use of the Service after the effective date constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms. If you do not agree with the updated Terms, you may terminate your account at any time before the effective date and obtain a pro rata refund for any unused subscription period.

disclaimer.title: Aviso médico y de crisis
disclaimer.primary: MindReset es una herramienta de bienestar, no una terapia, un dispositivo médico ni un servicio de crisis.
disclaimer.secondary: La IA utilizada aquí no puede diagnosticar, tratar ni sustituir a un profesional sanitario. Si se encuentra en crisis, en peligro o experimenta síntomas psicológicos graves, busque ayuda profesional.
disclaimer.ukCrisis: Reino Unido: Samaritans 116 123 (24/7). NHS 111, opción 2. Su GP. En caso de emergencia: 999 o A&E.

refund.title: Política de reembolso y cancelación
refund.intro: Esta Política de reembolso forma parte de nuestros Términos de servicio. Los precios actuales de todos los productos se muestran durante el proceso de compra.

minimind.title: Suscripciones MiniMind (Essential y Extended)
minimind.windowItem: Periodo de reembolso de 7 días desde la compra inicial — aplicable tanto a planes mensuales como anuales. Solicitudes mediante support@mindreset.ai con “REFUND” en el asunto. Después de 7 días, se aplicará la política estándar de cancelación.
minimind.cancelAnytimeItem: Puede cancelar en cualquier momento desde la configuración de facturación de su cuenta
minimind.whenCancelItem: Cuando cancele: no se realizarán más cobros, y su acceso continuará hasta el final del ciclo de facturación actual
minimind.endOfCycleItem: El acceso finaliza automáticamente al terminar el ciclo actual
minimind.noPartialItem: No se realizan reembolsos parciales ni prorrateados para cancelaciones después del periodo de 7 días

topup.title: Recarga de mensajes MiniMind
topup.priceItem: Compra única de £4.99 — añade 200 mensajes a su ciclo de facturación actual
topup.immediateUseItem: Entregado para uso inmediato como contenido digital
topup.waiverItem: Durante el proceso de compra, usted confirma la renuncia al derecho de cancelación de 14 días conforme al Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, a cambio de acceso inmediato
topup.expiryItem: Los mensajes adicionales expiran al final del ciclo de facturación actual

modules.title: States & Themes — compras individuales de módulos
modules.priceItem: £59 por módulo (usuarios sin suscripción) — compra única con acceso permanente
modules.subscriberDiscountItem: Los suscriptores activos de MiniMind (Essential o Extended) pagan £29 por módulo — descuento aplicado automáticamente durante el proceso de compra
modules.immediateAccessItem: El acceso comienza inmediatamente después de realizar el pago correctamente
modules.waiverItem: Durante el proceso de compra, usted confirma la renuncia al derecho de cancelación de 14 días conforme al Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, a cambio de acceso inmediato. Si no abre el módulo dentro de los 14 días posteriores a la compra, puede solicitar un reembolso completo enviando un correo a <mail>support@mindreset.ai</mail> con “REFUND” en el asunto
modules.openedNonRefundableItem: Una vez abierto el módulo, la compra no es reembolsable

journeyOnetime.title: The Journey — pago único
journeyOnetime.immediateUseItem: El contenido se proporciona para uso inmediato en los ocho bloques completos
journeyOnetime.waiverItem: Durante el proceso de compra, se le solicitará confirmar la renuncia al derecho de cancelación de 14 días a cambio de acceso inmediato
journeyOnetime.nonRefundableItem: No reembolsable desde el momento de la compra
journeyOnetime.noRefundsItem: No se realizan reembolsos bajo ninguna circunstancia después de la compra, salvo cuando lo exija el Consumer Rights Act 2015 en caso de contenido defectuoso

journeyInstalment.title: The Journey — plan de pagos semanales
journeyInstalment.scheduleItem: 12 pagos semanales de £55 — cada pago desbloquea el siguiente bloque de contenido
journeyInstalment.stopAnytimeItem: Puede detener los pagos futuros en cualquier momento
journeyInstalment.nonRefundablePaymentsItem: Los pagos semanales ya realizados no son reembolsables; el contenido desbloqueado previamente seguirá siendo accesible después de detener los pagos
journeyInstalment.firstBlockItem: Una vez que se haya accedido al primer bloque, el derecho al periodo de desistimiento deja de aplicarse

howto.title: Cómo solicitar un reembolso (cuando corresponda)
howto.intro: Envíe un email a <mail>support@mindreset.ai</mail> con «REFUND» en el asunto para que podamos gestionar rápidamente su solicitud. Incluya:
howto.emailItem: La dirección de correo electrónico asociada a su cuenta
howto.reasonItem: Motivo de la solicitud de reembolso
howto.outro: La elegibilidad será evaluada conforme a las reglas anteriores. Los reembolsos aprobados se procesan al método de pago original en un plazo de 10 días laborables.

faulty.title: Contenido defectuoso (se conservan los derechos legales)
faulty.body: Nada de lo dispuesto en esta Política de reembolso excluye sus derechos legales conforme al Consumer Rights Act 2015. Si el contenido digital es defectuoso, no coincide con la descripción o no funciona como se esperaba, repararemos, sustituiremos o reembolsaremos el contenido según lo exija la ley, independientemente de la renuncia confirmada durante la compra. Contacte con nosotros en support@mindreset.ai con los detalles del problema.

Terms.freeTasterCount: Every new account receives 50 free messages with MiniMind at no cost.
Terms.freeTasterNoCard: No card required. No time limit. Limited to one per email address.
Terms.subsIntro: Two tiers, each billed monthly or annually:
Terms.subsEssential: MiniMind Essential — £14.99/month or £129/year. 200 messages per billing cycle.
Terms.subsExtended: MiniMind Extended — £24.99/month or £209/year. 800 to 1,200 messages per billing cycle.
Terms.subsBilling: Charged to your chosen payment method until you cancel.
Terms.subsAllowanceReset: Message allowance resets at the start of each billing cycle and does not roll over.
Terms.subsRefundWindow: 7-day refund window: you may request a full refund within 7 days of your initial subscription purchase, having used fewer than 30 messages, by emailing support@mindreset.ai with REFUND in the subject.
Terms.subsAfterWindow: After 7 days or 30 messages used, the standard cancellation policy applies.
Terms.subsCancelRight: You may cancel at any time via your account billing settings.
Terms.subsNoFurtherCharges: No further payments will be taken.
Terms.subsAccessToEnd: Access continues until the end of your current billing cycle.
Terms.subsAccessEndsAuto: Access ends automatically at the end of the current cycle.
Terms.subsNoPartialRefund: No partial-cycle refunds are issued for cancellations after the 7-day window.
Terms.topupDescription: £4.99 one-off charge — adds 200 messages to your current billing cycle.
Terms.topupExpiry: Top-up messages expire when your billing cycle resets and do not roll over.
Terms.topupAvailability: Available to both Essential and Extended subscribers; stackable.
Terms.topupWaiver: At checkout, you confirm a waiver of the 14-day cancellation right under the Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, in exchange for immediate access.
Terms.refundBothIntervals: 7-day refund window applies to both monthly and annual plans.
Terms.refundRequestInstructions: To request a refund, email support@mindreset.ai with REFUND in the subject within 7 days of purchase and before using 30 messages.
Terms.refundAccessAfterCancel: If you cancel after the 7-day period, access continues until the end of your current billing cycle.
Terms.refundNoPartial: No partial or pro-rata refunds are issued after the 7-day window.
Terms.stModuleFull: States & Themes modules are available as individual one-off purchases at £59 per module.
Terms.stModuleSubscriber: For active MiniMind subscribers (Essential or Extended), the price is £29 per module. The discount is applied automatically at checkout when logged in with an active subscription.
Terms.stModuleRefund: At checkout, you confirm a waiver of the 14-day cancellation right under the Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, in exchange for immediate access. If you do not open the module within 14 days of purchase, you may request a full refund by emailing support@mindreset.ai with REFUND in the subject. Once the module has been opened, the purchase is non-refundable.
Terms.journeyOnetime: The Journey is available as a one-off purchase at £599. At checkout, you confirm a waiver of the 14-day cancellation right under the Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, in exchange for immediate access. Once the first block has been started, no refund is available.
Terms.journeyInstalment: The Journey is also available as a 12-week instalment plan at £55 per week. Each weekly payment unlocks the next block of content. You may stop future payments at any time; however, payments already made are non-refundable, and previously unlocked content remains accessible. Once the first block has been accessed, the right to a cooling-off period no longer applies.

Faq.metaDescription: Common questions about MindReset, MiniMind, pricing, privacy, and contact.

whatIsMindReset.question: What is MindReset?
whatIsMindReset.answer: MindReset is a self-help space. It's a quiet place to reflect, notice where you are, and choose what comes next, at your own pace. It isn't therapy, counselling, or medical care.

isTherapy.question: Is MindReset therapy?
isTherapy.answer: No. MindReset is not therapy, counselling, diagnosis, or treatment, and it isn't a substitute for professional help. If you need clinical support, please speak to a doctor or a qualified professional.

whatIsMiniMind.question: What is MiniMind?
whatIsMiniMind.answer: MiniMind is your daily companion inside MindReset. You can use it to reflect, talk things through, and find a bit of steadiness. You say as much or as little as you like, and it responds to what you share.

howToStart.question: How do I get started?
howToStart.answer: Open MiniMind and begin typing whenever you're ready. There's nothing to set up and no right way to start — even a few minutes is enough.

voiceInput.question: Can I speak instead of typing?
voiceInput.answer: Yes. You can type or speak to MiniMind — whichever feels easier. If you speak, your words are turned into text so you can read them back and edit before sending. You can switch between typing and speaking any time.

isItFree.question: Is it free?
isItFree.answer: You begin with 50 free messages, and you don't need to enter a card to use them. There's no time limit on them, so you can use them whenever the moment matters.

afterFreeMessages.question: What happens after my 50 free messages?
afterFreeMessages.answer: If you'd like to keep going, you can choose a subscription — Essential or Extended — or add a one-off top-up. There's no pressure to choose, and nothing happens automatically.

essentialVsExtended.question: What's the difference between Essential and Extended?
essentialVsExtended.answer: The two plans offer different monthly message allowances. You can see current details, prices, and change your plan any time on your Account page.

whatIsTopUp.question: What is a top-up?
whatIsTopUp.answer: A top-up adds 200 extra messages as a one-off, on top of whatever plan you're on. It's entirely optional, and you'll never be billed for it automatically.

willIBeCharged.question: Will I be charged automatically?
willIBeCharged.answer: Subscriptions renew on a regular cycle until you cancel, and you'll always know before a renewal. Top-ups are one-off and are never charged automatically. You can cancel a subscription at any time.

howToCancel.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
howToCancel.answer: You can cancel any time from your Account page. You'll keep access until the end of the period you've already paid for, and you won't be charged again after that.

isPrivate.question: Is my information private?
isPrivate.answer: Yes. We collect as little as possible — no name or address is required to use MiniMind. Your conversations are stored privately and are protected in line with UK data protection law.

whoCanSee.question: Who can see my conversations?
whoCanSee.answer: Your conversations are yours. They're stored privately so that only you can access them through your account, and they are never shared or sold.

retention.question: How long do you keep my conversations?
retention.answer: Your conversation messages are kept for up to 12 months from your last activity, after which they're automatically deleted. You can delete them sooner yourself at any time. We also keep a short summary of the patterns you share, used to personalise your experience across sessions, for as long as your account stays open.

canDelete.question: Can I delete my data?
canDelete.answer: Yes. You can delete your conversations at any time from your account settings, and you can delete your account and all associated data — including your saved summary — whenever you like. After a deletion request, your data is permanently erased within 30 days. You can also email us at support@mindreset.ai for help with this.

medicalAdvice.question: Can MiniMind give medical or mental-health advice?
medicalAdvice.answer: No. MiniMind doesn't diagnose, treat, or give medical or clinical advice. It's a space for self-reflection. For anything clinical, please speak to a qualified professional.

crisisHelp.question: What should I do if I'm in crisis or feel unsafe?
crisisHelp.answer: MindReset is not a crisis service. If you're in immediate danger, call your local emergency services (999 in the UK). If you're struggling and need someone to talk to right now, you can call Samaritans free on 116 123 (UK), any time, day or night.

ageRequirement.question: Do I need to be a certain age to use MindReset?
ageRequirement.answer: Yes. MindReset is for adults aged 18 and over.

languages.question: What languages does MindReset support?
languages.answer: MindReset is available in English and Russian. You can switch language from your account settings.

mobileUse.question: Can I use MindReset on my phone?
mobileUse.answer: Yes. MindReset works in your phone's web browser as well as on a computer — there's nothing to install.

contact.question: How do I contact you?
contact.answer: You can reach us at support@mindreset.ai. We'll do our best to reply, though please remember we're not a crisis service — for urgent help, use the contacts in the crisis question above.
